title: Schoolyard Census
subtitle: The whole grounds, corner to corner
intro: Last time you worked the edges. This time, take the full census -- sun and shade, walls and far corners, until the map has no blank spots.
outro: A full-grounds census is the kind of fieldwork ecologists get paid to do. Nobody knows this place better than you now.

steps.description: Find a fungus or a lichen
steps.hint: Lichens look like crusty paint splotches on bricks, bark, and sidewalks. They count.

steps.description: Find an insect that's new to your Dex
steps.hint: Fence rails, windowsills, the base of walls -- new bugs keep to the edges.

steps.description: Find a bird using the building
Log something 150 meters from every find you've ever made
steps.hint: Last time was 50 meters. This is the far corner of the map -- go past where anyone bothers to look.
